what_it_does: A machine-readable interpretive summary of a gap-analysis log, recording what the analysed source material exhibits that the design system does not yet implement, together with confidence grading, evidence provenance, proposed token or component homes, and synthesized principles.
observations: It is a JSON interpretive ledger entry for SYSTEM-GAPS.md, not the raw markdown source.
It documents a confidence-graded inventory of missing design-system implementations.
It records exact sampled hex values and proposed token recalibrations.
It introduces a register/purpose dimension: terse/presented versus verbose/leave-behind cuts.
It articulates a space-time complexity budget in which motion and density are one control.
It treats level-of-detail as orthogonal to surface size and invariant skeleton versus flexible muscle.
It proposes a containment-tree capstone that unifies every parametric axis.
It lists new motifs and atoms to tokenize, each with a proposed home.
It encodes restraint guardrails as explicit refused anti-patterns.
It routes every finding to a concrete token file or component candidate.
It closes with embedding-oriented summary and intention fields.
standouts: Space-time complexity budget unifying motion and density as a single control.
Containment-tree synthesis as the spine for all parametric axes.
Invariant skeleton as a node-type property: numbers are sacred, prose is variable.
Restraint guardrails encoded as explicit refused anti-patterns.
conventions: Structured JSON schema with project, path, and model metadata.
Concise factual statements in each field.
Confidence sectioning by number of confirming folders.
Star-headed section markers for confirmed or synthesis-ready clusters.
Every finding routed to a concrete token file or component candidate.
Append-style running-log growth; nothing built until cross-folder confirmed.
Embedding summary and intention fields at the end.
concerns: Near-white hex values appear with minor variations and need reconciliation before tokenizing.
As an interpretive summary, provenance is one level removed from the raw source material.
The large motif inventory risks premature atomization if not all entries are multiply confirmed.
notes: A confidence-graded, evidence-routed interpretive summary of the gap between analysed source material and the design system, intended to feed a grounded token and component backlog.
questions: Which near-white hex set is authoritative once the minor variations are reconciled?
When will a product-UI-heavy folder be mined to confirm the embedded app-chrome vocabulary?
How does the containment-tree capstone map onto the existing component architecture?
What criteria determine when a log entry graduates into a token or component?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file is titled and structured as a gap inventory, and it delivers a confidence-graded, provenance-backed list of missing implementations with proposed homes.
apparent_themes: One containment tree as the spine of every axis.
Definition by refusal through restraint guardrails.
intention_signals: To accumulate, with evidence and provenance, every concrete thing the real design system is missing so synthesis can graduate only multiply-confirmed values into tokens and components rather than acting on a single sample.
novelty: The repeated derivation of deep principles from the diff between two cuts of one source, such as the space-time budget, conserved ink-budget, and invariant skeleton, and the unification of all parametric axes onto one containment tree.
contribution: Contributes the sampled token values, the new-motif and atom inventory with proposed homes, the register, LOD, space-time, and containment-tree principles, and the restraint anti-pattern list that a fused system would keep as its grounded backlog and DNA rules.
summary_for_embedding: A confidence-graded interpretive summary of a design-system gap log, cataloguing missing motifs, sampled values, cross-cutting principles, and proposed token or component homes with provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To accumulate evidence-backed gaps between source material and the design system so only multiply-confirmed findings graduate into tokens and components.
